22.reason: [The swap function does not correctly reverse the rotation. It performs a left-rotation instead of a true swap, so undoing the operation with the same function does not restore the original array state, leading to incorrect permutations.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The swap function does not correctly reverse the rotation. It performs a left-rotation instead of a true swap, so undoing the operation with the same function does not restore the original array state, leading to incorrect permutations.]
